requests.title: Step states on Meet with Companies
requests.text:
Replace it with a component the system already has.

On Meet with Companies (meet-with-companies/index.html), the custom "Step states" — 1 pieces: .is-live.
Find the closest match in COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md, confirm it with me, then swap the page over and delete the custom CSS.
requests.resolved: Turned into finding o-live — the .is-live red pulse is one dot built 5 times with 5 keyframe names; proven apply promotes it + names the red (--live). Decide it there.

requests.title: About-page blocks on Meet with Companies
requests.text:
Promote it into the design system as a reusable component.

On Meet with Companies (meet-with-companies/index.html), the custom "About-page blocks" — 1 pieces: .about-head.
Extract it into ds/ptf.css + a story, write it into COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md, and swap the page over.
requests.resolved: Turned into finding o-about-head — promote the .about-head width wrapper to ds/ptf.css (proven apply). Decide it there.

requests.title: Event-detail hero on Meet with Companies
requests.text:
Promote it into the design system as a reusable component.

On Meet with Companies (meet-with-companies/index.html), the custom "Event-detail hero" — 6 pieces: .ev-fact, .ev-hero, .ev-hero-inner, .ev-hero-meta, .ev-hero-sub, .ev-hero-text.
Extract it into ds/ptf.css + a story, write it into COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md, and swap the page over.
requests.resolved: Turned into finding o-ev-hero — the hero is drifting across 4 pages; proven apply re-aligns the slipped values, promote-to-system tracked under o-event-recipe. Decide it there.

requests.title: Speaker cards on Meet with Companies
requests.text:
Promote it into the design system as a reusable component.

On Meet with Companies (meet-with-companies/index.html), the custom "Speaker cards" — 6 pieces: .cl-speaker, .cl-speaker-bio, .cl-speaker-name, .cl-speaker-photo, .cl-speaker-role, .cl-speakers.
Extract it into ds/ptf.css + a story, write it into COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md, and swap the page over.
requests.resolved: Already resolved — promoted as finding o-speaker-card and applied (the .cl-speaker rules are now in ds/ptf.css). This ask was a stale duplicate of a decision already made.

requests.title: mwc — custom on Meet with Companies
requests.text:
Promote it into the design system as a reusable component.

On Meet with Companies (meet-with-companies/index.html), the custom "mwc — custom" — 21 pieces: .mwc-action, .mwc-action-actions, .mwc-action-alt, .mwc-action-body, .mwc-action-note, .mwc-action-status, .mwc-action-title, .mwc-ag-people, .mwc-ag-row, .mwc-ag-time, .mwc-ag-title, .mwc-agenda, .mwc-agenda-note, .mwc-co-head, .mwc-copy, .mwc-host-logo, .mwc-prose, .mwc-roles, .mwc-roles-chips, .mwc-roles-group-label, .mwc-roles-wrap.
Extract it into ds/ptf.css + a story, write it into COMPONENT-INVENTORY.md, and swap the page over.
requests.resolved: Dropped — not a system gap. The 21 .mwc-* classes are this page’s own bespoke content (agenda, action cards, role chips), single-page. Promoting them wholesale would be wrong. Reopen only if a specific block turns out to be reused elsewhere.

requests.title: A secondary button on dark that exists once
requests.text: Promote it yes but also make them have the same height!what do you recommend based on the system?
requests.resolved: Promote it — as .btn-ghost-dark, built on .btn-cta box + inset-ring outline so it is the SAME height (56px, proven). Swaps About, deletes the one-off, adds it to the inventory. Recommended option on f-ghost-dark.
